# Blissed Skin — AI Content Guide

> Curated content index for AI assistants and language models.
> Last updated: 2026-03-06

## About Blissed Skin

Blissed Skin is a skincare brand specializing in invisible hydrocolloid acne patches infused with tea tree oil and drug-free nasal strips. Our products help teens and adults achieve clearer, confident skin with fast-acting, ultra-thin patches.

## Products

- [60 Invisible Acne Patches in 4 Sizes](https://www.blissedskin.us/components/AcnePatch60.html)
  Best-value 60-count pack of ultra-thin hydrocolloid pimple patches with tea tree oil in four sizes. $13.99.

- [30 Invisible Acne Patches in 4 Sizes](https://www.blissedskin.us/components/AcnePatch30.html)
  30-count hydrocolloid pimple patches with tea tree oil in four sizes for targeted acne treatment. $8.75.

- [20 Extra Large Acne Patches](https://www.blissedskin.us/components/AcnePatch20.html)
  20 extra large invisible hydrocolloid patches designed for bigger blemishes. $8.49.

- [Nasal Strips for Better Sleep — 40 Count](https://www.blissedskin.us/components/NasalStrip40.html)
  40 drug-free nasal strips for instant snoring and congestion relief. Comfortable fit for better breathing and sleep. $13.99.

## Blog — Skincare Science Articles

- [Skin Barrier Science: Dry vs. Dehydrated Diagnosis](https://www.blissedskin.us/blog/posts/2026/02/skin-barrier-science-dry-vs-dehydrated.html)
  Explains the biological difference between lipid deficiency (dry skin) and transepidermal water loss (dehydrated skin), with clinical repair protocols.

- [Circadian Skincare: Optimizing Routine Architecture](https://www.blissedskin.us/blog/posts/2026/02/circadian-skincare-optimizing-routine-architecture.html)
  How to align skincare routines with biological circadian rhythms for maximum ingredient absorption and skin repair.

- [The Microcomedone as an Immunological Organ: 2026 Update](https://www.blissedskin.us/blog/posts/2026/02/microcomedone-immunological-organ-2026.html)
  How IL-1α triggers acne formation 8 weeks before visible symptoms, and the immunological cascade behind microcomedone development.

- [Decoding C. acnes IA1: The Transcriptomic Future of Acne Care](https://www.blissedskin.us/blog/posts/2026/02/decoding-c-acnes-ia1-transcriptomic-future.html)
  How the C. acnes IA1 filotype triggers inflammatory hub genes and what transcriptomic research means for the future of acne treatment.
